changes: Holy Spirit: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Requiescat potency has been increased from 560 to 600.
Confiteor: Potency has been increased from 900 to 1,000.
Expiacion: Potency has been increased from 340 to 420.
Blade of Faith: Potency has been increased from 460 to 480.
Blade of Truth: Potency has been increased from 540 to 560.
Storm's Path: Potency has been increased from 130 to 150. Combo potency has been increased from 410 to 430.
Storm's Eye: Potency has been increased from 130 to 150. Combo potency has been increased from 410 to 430.
Fell Cleave: Potency has been increased from 460 to 470.
Upheaval: Potency has been increased from 350 to 360.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Asphodelos (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid content that now includes the power of the Echo, increasing players' maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.

new_content.name: Abyssos: The Eighth Circle (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid battle in which the HP of the boss, Hephaistos, has been reduced.

new_content.name: Island sanctuary
new_content.description: A system where various issues were resolved, including animal appearances, pasture placement, workshop and granary functionality, and achievement acquisition.

housing.name: Pendant Wall Light
housing.description: An interior furnishing item whose illumination has been adjusted.

glamour.name: Isle Farmhand's Boots
glamour.description: An item mentioned in the resolved issues as having incorrect graphics when equipped with certain other gear.
